title: Gemini Omni Tutorial: How to Use Gemini Omni AI for Beginners
summary: Tutorial demonstrating Google Omni Flash for AI video editing and generation. The video tests physics simulation, character consistency, scene memory, and compares Omni Flash against Sora (Seedance 2), showing both strengths in editable workflows and limitations in physics accuracy and scene continuity.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Master walks through Google's Omni Flash for AI video editing and generation, aimed at beginners. It tests physics simulation, character consistency, and scene memory, and benchmarks Omni Flash against Sora (Seedance 2). The takeaways: Omni Flash shows strengths in editable, iterative workflows but has limitations in physics accuracy and scene continuity.
